name: genesis-conductor-barcelona-extropic-font
description: Barcelona-Extropic Font System: production typography infrastructure by Igor Holt (@invariantx) for Genesis Conductor brand assets. Rust WASM + Cloudflare Workers edge delivery for Didone-class typeface with mathematically verified 12:1 contrast, proof-of-render SHA-256 hashing on every SVG output, GPU-optimized chirality transforms, and universal integration (Web, iOS WKWebView, Google Workspace Add-ons, Electron, Claude Artifacts). 34-test invariant suite, immutable R2 caching, custom CSS properties and utility classes. Serves as canonical visual identity layer across Genesis Conductor properties, OpenClaw documentation, agent dashboards, and thermodynamic visualization surfaces.

plugins.name: barcelona-extropic-font
plugins.description: Rust WASM font rendering engine with Cloudflare Workers edge delivery and cryptographic proof-of-render verification. Delivers brand-consistent Didone typography to all Genesis Conductor surfaces including agent consoles, documentation, and Claude Artifacts. 34 invariant tests ensure production reliability.
